We have spoken about the ancient past and the deep historical ties between our two peoples, and…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah accused Israel of committing a series of "mobile massacres" against innocent civilians in southern Beirut, central Beirut, Sidon, the south and the Bekaa, with dozens of strikes killing and wounding hundreds of children, women and elderly people. The statement, issued under Operation Truthful Promise 4, accused Israel of starting a "savage massacre" in Beirut hours after a ceasefire agreement was reached. The IRGC also warned the United States, calling it “perfidious”, and said it will act according to its duty. “Victory from Allah and a near triumph,” it added. @wfwitness

As we speak, roughly 440 kilograms of enriched uranium remain hidden in the mountains of Iran. This is not the outcome we expected.

↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇵🇰🇺🇸 And how do we know that Trump is negotiating with himself through Pakistan? The original post made by Pakistani PM on X started with an interesting line: *Draft - Pakistan's PM Message on X* The post has since been edited. But it's now pretty clear…" 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 This appears to be the sequence of events: ➡️ The Trump administration drafted the statement released by the Pakistani prime minister regarding the ceasefire ( evidenced by a leftover header in the document ). ➡️ The statement included Lebanon as part of the ceasefire agreement. ➡️ Netanyahu called Trump after the agreement was made public. ➡️ Israel then bombed Lebanon, killing nearly 100 people and injuring around 700. ➡️ Trump subsequently stated that Lebanon was not part of the agreement. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "❗️ Only Iran can make sure Lebanon is saved now because the U.S clearly said Lebanon isn't pressuring enough to foil the ceasefire Only the U.S can force Netanyahu to stop the war." Just before the ceasefire was announced, Netanyahu raised the issue of Lebanon in a phone call with Trump. During that conversation, the two agreed that Israel could continue its attacks in Lebanon even as the ceasefire with Iran took effect. According to U.S. officials, the White House does not believe these ongoing strikes in Lebanon will cause the broader ceasefire with Iran to fall apart. Source: Axios

Israeli Opposition Leader Yair Lapid: Netanyahu turned us into a client state, receiving instructions by phone on matters at the core of our national security. This war was conducted as if Israeli citizens were cannon fodder. This government lost the Democrats, lost large parts of the Republicans, lost Europe. It’s time to admit the truth: Netanyahu has lost it. He pushed the United States into war without any political vision for how to end it.

Israeli Opposition Leader Yair Lapid: Netanyahu delivered the worst possible outcome. The Iranian regime was not defeated. The nuclear threat was not removed. The ballistic missiles and Hezbollah’s rockets are still aimed at every home in Israel. Israel went to this war with rare national consensus. The public supported it from wall to wall. After six weeks of casualties and citizens running to shelters, it became clear that Netanyahu cannot win a single campaign. The prime minister deceived the citizens of Israel and deceived his partners. He sold the public a strategic plan that did not exist. Israel had no influence on the agreement signed last night between the United States and Iran. They will tell you we influenced it behind the scenes. These are empty lies.

🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 An image has emerged of a UAE Mirage 2000-9 fighter jet that carried out strikes against the petrochemical facilities on Iran's Lavan Island in the Persian Gulf earlier today. The incident on Lavan Island occurred roughly eight hours after the announcement of a U.S.-Iran ceasefire. Note: The UAE is the only operator of the Mirage 2000-9, an upgraded export variant of the French Mirage 2000 design, in the region. The UAE Air Force has been phasing out its fleet of these aircraft in favor of Rafale fighters.

Israeli Opposition Leader Yair Lapid absolutely blasts Netanyahu: In a few hours when gets out his bunker, he will try to sell you that the campaign in Iran was a success. That will be a complete lie. What happened here is a diplomatic disaster on a scale I do not remember. Netanyahu led us into a strategic collapse. This was a toxic combination of arrogance, irresponsibility, lack of planning, and negligence on the home front. He sold lies to the Americans that damaged trust between our two countries.

🇮🇷 ⚡️ Statement No. 56 of Operation “True Promise 4” by the IRGC: Only hours after the ceasefire agreement, the Zionist entity—marked by its wolf-like nature, where brutality and the killing of innocent people, children, and women are an inseparable part of its identity—has begun a brutal massacre in Beirut. We issue a strong warning to the United States, which breaks its promises, and its Zionist partner, the executioner: if the attacks on dear Lebanon do not stop immediately, we will act according to our duty and deliver a regret-inducing response to the evil aggressors in the region. Victory is from God, and conquest is near.

Iran’s IRGC warns that if attacks on Lebanon do not stop immediately, it will deliver a “regret-inducing response” to what it calls regional aggressors. The statement accuses Israel of launching new strikes in Beirut just hours after the ceasefire and also blames the U.S., warning both countries against further escalation.

Hezbollah statement: ‘With its blind hatred, its habitual criminality, and its boundless brutality, which has become ingrained in its nature, the Israeli enemy committed a series of massacres today against innocent civilians. It targeted civilian areas in the southern suburbs of Beirut, the capital, Sidon, southern Lebanon, and the Bekaa Valley with dozens of brutal airstrikes, leaving hundreds of martyrs and wounded, including children, women, and the elderly. This barbaric aggression, which at every stage constitutes war crimes and acts of genocide by targeting crowded civilian areas, markets, and shops during peak hours, is nothing but a desperate attempt to take revenge on civilians after all attempts to break and subdue this proud people have failed. Our honorable people and the sons of this land have proven that the brutality of the aggression has only increased their steadfastness, resilience, and adherence to the path of resistance, no matter the immense sacrifices they have made. This unbridled aggression is a clear expression of the enemy's frustration after its resounding failure to achieve any of its objectives and plans on various fronts. It reveals its vulnerability to defeat, its inability to alter the equations imposed by the steadfastness of the Iranian and Lebanese peoples, and reflects the state of collapse, confusion, and disarray plaguing this beleaguered entity and its defeated army, battered by the blows of the resistance fighters. We affirm that the blood of the martyrs and the wounded will not be shed in vain. Today's massacres, like all acts of aggression and brutal crimes, underscore our natural and legal right to resist the occupation and respond to its aggression. They will only strengthen our resolve to resist and confront the enemy, to deter its aggression, and to defend our people and our homeland, protecting our security in the face of this ongoing aggression.’
Explosions heard in Tehran province and Karaj, Iran

بيان صادر عن حزب الله حول المجازر التي ارتكبها العدو الصهيوني بحق المدنيين الآمنين: بحقده الأعمى وإجرامه المعهود ووحشيته اللامتناهية، التي أصبحت طبيعة متأصلة لديه، ارتكب العدو الإسرائيلي اليوم سلسلة مجازر متنقلة بحق المدنيين الآمنين، مستهدفًا بعشرات الغارات الوحشية المناطق المدنية في الضاحية الجنوبية والعاصمة بيروت، وفي صيدا والجنوب والبقاع، وموقعًا مئات الشهداء والجرحى من الأطفال والنساء والشيوخ. إن هذا العدوان الهمجي الذي يمثل في كل محطة من محطاته جرائم حرب موصوفة وجرائم إبادة جماعية باستهدافه أماكن مدنية مكتظة وأسواق ومحلات تجارية في ساعات الذروة، ليس إلا محاولة يائسة للانتقام من المواطنين المدنيين بعد فشل كل محاولات كسر هذا الشعب الأبي وإخضاعه، حيث أثبت أهلنا الشرفاء وأبناء البلد أن وحشية العدوان لم تزدهم إلا صمودًا وثباتًا وتمسكًا بخيار المقاومة، مهما قدموا من تضحيات جسام. إن هذا الإجرام المتفلت هو تعبير واضح عن الخيبة التي مُني بها العدو بعد فشله الذريع في تحقيق أي من أهدافه ومخططاته على مختلف الجبهات، وبعد أن وجد نفسه محاصرًا بحقيقة هزيمته، وعاجزًا ومكبلًا عن تغيير المعادلات التي فرضها صمود شعبَي إيران ولبنان، وتعبير عن حالة الانهيار والتخبط والارتباك التي يعيشها هذا الكيان المأزوم وجيشه المهزوم بفعل ضربات المجاهدين. إننا نؤكد أن دماء الشهداء والجرحى لن تذهب هدرًا، وأن مجازر اليوم كما كل الاعتداءات والجرائم الوحشية، تؤكد على حقنا الطبيعي والقانوني بمقاومة الاحتلال والرد على عدوانه، وستزيدنا إصرارًا على المقاومة والمواجهة لكبح جماح العدو والدفاع عن أهلنا ووطننا وحماية أمننا في وجه العدوان المستمر. #الإعلام_الحربي
